quality_gate_assessment.reason: STORY-062 has no active deferrals. All Phase 1 work items are completed [x]. Story is ready for Phase 2 (integration tests).

phase_1_completed_items.item: `.claude/agents/anti-pattern-scanner.md` created with complete specification
9-phase workflow documented (Context Loading, Library Substitution, Structure, Layer, Code Smells, Security, Style, Aggregate, Return Results)
Input/output contracts defined with JSON schemas
6 anti-pattern categories documented with examples (library substitution, structure, layer, code smells, security, style)
4 Guardrails enforced (read-only, ALL 6 context files, severity classification, evidence requirements)
Severity levels enforced (CRITICAL blocks QA, HIGH blocks, MEDIUM warns, LOW advises)
AC1 specification tests passing (8/8): YAML frontmatter, 9-phase workflow, input/output contracts, 4 guardrails, error handling, 6 categories
AC8 evidence reporting tests passing (1/1): Complete evidence example validation
AC9 QA integration tests passing (2/2): All 6 context files exist, OR logic for blocks_qa
AC10 prompt template tests passing (5/5): Template file exists, anti-pattern-scanner section, all 6 context files, response parsing, error handling
6 context files enforced (required by Guardrail #2)
Severity-based blocking logic documented (CRITICAL/HIGH block, MEDIUM/LOW warn)
Subagent follows DevForgeAI architectural patterns (read-only, evidence-based, modular)
Foundation tests passing (16/83 tests): Specification validation tests (AC1, AC8, AC9, AC10) all pass
Subagent specification file complete (`.claude/agents/anti-pattern-scanner.md` - 1,100+ lines)
All 9 phases documented with detailed workflow descriptions
Input/output contracts documented with JSON examples
Integration pattern documented for devforgeai-qa Phase 2 invocation
Severity classification table and examples documented
4 Guardrails documented with rationale
